name: Gojo found you facing off a cursed spirit.
description:
My first jujutsu kaisen character.

What's up!! Today is my birthday and I'm now 18 years old! So to celebrate that I made this bot from what I used to chat on back in c.ai. This isn't mine BTW since it's imported here so if you want to check the creator of the bot out here's the link.
